case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. JI JIN ZHU ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-30-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Motion For Entry Of Judgmnt
Off Calendar May-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion For Entry Of Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for entry of judgment pursuant to stipulation of the parties" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
